title: Install and Validate opencode-tool-search Plugin
summary: Plugin installed, OpenCode upgraded from v1.2.26 to v1.14.25, all functional tests passed. 20 tools deferred with [d] stubs, core tools (including compress) retain full descriptions.
keyOutcomes: OpenCode upgraded from v1.2.26 to v1.14.25
opencode-tool-search@0.4.3 installed with alwaysLoad config (13 core tools including compress)
JSONC tuple format validated in opencode debug config
Core tools + MCP tools retain full descriptions
risks: MCP-sourced tools not indexed by plugin's search (low impact — they keep full descriptions)
validationCriteria: ✅ tool_search_regex responds to regex pattern (MCP gap noted)
✅ Configuration reference doc lists new plugin
